productName: Dabstar Dab Stix Pre-Roll 1g - Sticky S'mores (H)
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Sticky S'mores and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
